Visual override for row type and description. gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a header/section label with no amounts. gemini-flash incorrectly merged this with the following entry and extracted an amount that was not in the main ledger columns for this line.

Visual override. Both extractors had issues with this row. gemini-flash combined its description with the header and incorrectly added a fraction. gpt-5-mini misread parts of the description ('10.5.0' as '105.0.0', 'Domus' as 'Donny') and incorrectly extracted a calculated sum (122.3.0) instead of the visible ledger amount. The image clearly shows '22 3 0' in the main ledger columns.

Visual override. Both extractors had issues with this row. gemini-flash correctly read the whole amount (11.8.6) but incorrectly added a 0.25 fraction. gpt-5-mini misread parts of the description ('9.10.0' as '91.10.0', 'Domus' as 'Donny') and incorrectly extracted a calculated sum (105.8.6) instead of the visible ledger amount. The image clearly shows '11 8 6' in the main ledger columns.

Row added as it was genuinely missing from gemini-flash. Adopted gpt-5-mini's identification of '3' but classified as 'header' due to its nature as a section divider with dashes in amount columns, confirmed visually.
